PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kyle Sallee, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges that pursuant to recent filings, it is confirmed that the decedent resided in San Francisco. The court and Petitioner discuss the several tasks that he will be expected to complete and the rules that he must follow if appointed Administrator of the Estate. The court and Petitioner discuss the life insurance policy and that he should consider hiring an attorney to handle that matter as it could be a complicated task. The court advises Petitioner that it is inclined to order a bond in the amount of $1,000,000 but that it will be taking this matter under submission to reconsider the bond amount.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
